summary: B6: src/lib/embed.ts — replace OpenRouter client with fetch to local Ollama /api/embed (nomic-embed-text:v1.5, 768-dim)

resolution.note: embed.ts now uses fetch to local Ollama /api/embed with nomic-embed-text:v1.5. Public API unchanged. Typed EmbedError for unreachable/non-200/malformed cases. 4 unit tests, full suite passes (62 passed).
